case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. MERLIN HAYDEE FERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,791.39 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, MERLIN HAYDEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-15-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-15-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-15-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC ZOCO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT MERLIN HAYDEE FERNANDEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, MERLIN HAYDEE $1,791.39 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,896.39 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 SERVED DEC-27-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, MERLIN HAYDEE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED DEC-27-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, MERLIN HAYDEE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-15-2017 - JUDGMENT.
